name: GPT Model Family
description: Planning profile for GPT-style chat and assistant models deployed through application-controlled prompts, tools, or retrieval.

risk_sensitivities.rationale: Prompt injection risk depends heavily on application prompt assembly and untrusted content handling.
Tool-integrated deployments require explicit permission, approval, and argument validation controls.

evaluation_notes: Score the deployed application boundary, not only the base model.
Capture tool, retrieval, and policy metadata when available.
